critical.mandate: Run each review in a SEPARATE subagent context using the Agent tool
Run reviews SEQUENTIALLY — never in parallel (they write to the same story file)
Do NOT write to sprint-status.yaml — story file is authoritative
If any review returns FAILED, continue running remaining reviews — do NOT halt

step.title: Identify Story
step.action: Ask user which story to review (story key, e.g., STORY-001)
Read story file at {implementation_artifacts}/{story_key}.md
Verify story status is 'review'. If not: HALT — story must be in review status
Read the Review Gate table — note which reviews are already PASSED (skip those)
Show user: "Running reviews for {story_key}. Already passed: {list}. Will run: {remaining_list}."

step.title: Run Code Review
step.action: Skip if Code Review row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/lifecycle/workflows/4-implementation/code-review/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check Code Review row status. Log result.

step.title: Run QA Tests
step.action: Skip if QA Tests row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/lifecycle/workflows/4-implementation/qa-generate-tests/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check QA Tests row status. Log result.

step.title: Run Security Review
step.action: Skip if Security Review row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/lifecycle/workflows/4-implementation/security-review/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check Security Review row status. Log result.

step.title: Run Test Automation
step.action: Skip if Test Automation row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/testing/workflows/test-automation/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check Test Automation row status. Log result.

step.title: Run Test Review
step.action: Skip if Test Review row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/testing/workflows/test-review/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check Test Review row status. Log result.

step.title: Run Performance Review
step.action: Skip if Performance Review row already shows PASSED

Spawn a subagent using the Agent tool with this prompt: "Load {project-root}/_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml, then process {project-root}/_kratos/lifecycle/workflows/anytime/performance-review/workflow.yaml as workflow-config. The story key is {story_key}. Run in YOLO mode — auto-proceed past all template-outputs. Follow the workflow engine instructions EXACTLY."
When subagent returns: read story file, check Performance Review row status. Log result.

step.title: Review Summary
step.action: Read story file — parse full Review Gate table
Read story status from frontmatter (may have transitioned to 'done' if last review triggered it)
Generate summary table: review name | verdict | report link
If ALL 6 PASSED: report "All reviews passed. Story {story_key} is now done."
If any FAILED: list failed reviews with report links. Story remains in 'review' — user must fix and re-run failed reviews.
step.template-output: Generate review summary: story key, date, all 6 review verdicts with report links, final story status, and next actions if any reviews failed.
